title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the economic implications of AGI, including optimal taxation mechanisms, wealth redistribution strategies, and inequality dynamics. The discussion challenges intuitive assumptions about how AI progress affects capital's economic share and explores scenarios where better AI could paradoxically reduce AI's share of total economic output.
